channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Bangladesh win last T20 and take series over Zimbabwe @Reuters
item.description: via Reuters #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: Zimbabwe Gears Up Drive for Tourism Recovery Push
item.description: via dailyasianage.com #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: dailyasianage.com

item.title: Four miners die after shaft collapse
item.description: A MINING disaster in Chinhoyi, Mashonaland West Province, has claimed the lives of four miners after a shaft at Rowdy Mine collapsed, trapping workers underground. Rescue teams recovered the final two bodies on Saturday morning after an overnight operation, bringing the death tol via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: The Deathbed Confession: Chitungwiza father of 6 now on Oxygen Ventilator after defaulting on ARVs, wife fled!
item.description: A Breath Away from Despair: The Cost of Non-Adherence in Zimbabwe’s Health Crisis Chitungwiza – In a stark and heart-wrenching tale that underscores the critical importance of medical adherence and the devastating impact of a failing infrastructure, Mr. David Mandiwenga, a 41-yea via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Dr Barnabas Marambire: Building Zimbabwe Through Enterprise, Excellence and Purpose
item.description: Business Correspondent|For Dr Barnabas Marambire, entrepreneurship is about far more than running successful businesses. It is about empowering communities, creating... Continue reading "Dr Barnabas Marambire: Building Zimbabwe Through Enterprise, Excellence and Purpose" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Is Varun’s pursuit of Dairibord a game-changer or risky takeover? @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Is Varun’s pursuit of Dairibord a game-changer or risky takeover? – herald Nelson Gahadza VARUN BEVERAGES’ emergence as the frontrunner to acquire a controlling stake in Dairibord Holdings represents one of the most significant corporate developments in Zimbabwe’s food an via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Prostate cancer screening launched nationwide
item.description: SHAMAINE CHIRIMUJIRI THE National Men’s Forum (NMF), in partnership with the University of Zimbabwe (UZ), has launched a nationwide prostate cancer screening... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Zec backs voters roll reforms
item.description: BRIGHTON MURONZEREYI THE Zimbabwe Electoral Commission (Zec) says the transfer of voter registration and maintenance of the voters roll to the Registrar-General’s... item.title: Growing reserves guarantee stability of local currency — Prof Ncube @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Debra Matabvu ZIMBABWEANS can now keep their savings in Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) as the local currency has become stable owing to a combination of measures that are boosting confidence in... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: Zimbabwe inches closer to sole use of ZiG for domestic transactions @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Debra Mutabvu ZIMBABWE is inching closer to the sole use of the local currency — Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) — for domestic transactions after meeting six of the eight conditions that... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: No tribe is superior to the other: VP Mohadi @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Raymond Jaravaza Bulawayo Bureau ZIMBABWE is erasing the colonial-era hierarchies of culture, replacing them with a revolutionary equity where no culture is superior to another and where no one and... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: After Mukanya, all eyes turn to Majaivana... Fans dream of another legendary return @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Langalakhe Mabena, Sunday Life Reporter THE prospect of witnessing Chimurenga legend Thomas “Mukanya” Mapfumo return to the Zimbabwean stage has reignited a longing among local music lovers – a longing... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: STEVE MAKONI STILL IN THE GAME
item.description: Trust Khosa FEW Zimbabwean entertainers have reinvented themselves as successfully and consistently as Stephen “Steve” Makoni. Over the decades, he has worn many hats with remarkable ease, proving that talent, discipline and perseverance can coexist in one extraordinary individua via Sundaymail #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Sundaymail

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
